title: 【美國國會最新消息：香港人權與民主法案 】

replies.msg:
【美國國會最新消息：香港人權與民主法案 】
Update on the Hong Kong Human Rights and Democracy Acts.

法案而家由參眾兩院嘅委員會初步審議緊。草案嘅細節喺星期三朝早前會完成修訂，然後就要分別交畀眾議院同參議院嘅外交委員會處理。到目前爲止，參議院法案 (S. 1838) 有最少20位議員表示支持，而眾議院法案(H.R. 3289)有最少33位議員支持。兩條法案都估計可以通過參眾兩院嘅委員會，最快希望可以喺十月嘅國會休會後進行審議。

A quick update on where we are at with the "Hong Kong Human Rights and Democracy Act". Currently, the companion bills (one for the Senate and one for the House of Representatives) are being marked up by its respective committees. The bills will be proposed to the Senate committee on Foreign Relations and the House committee on Foreign Affairs, respectively, on Wednesday. Both bills are expected to clear both committees. If all goes well, it should proceed to the floor after the congressional recess in October.

quote.msg:
【美國國會最新消息：香港人權與民主法案 】
Update on the Hong Kong Human Rights and Democracy Acts.

法案而家由參眾兩院嘅委員會初步審議緊。草案嘅細節喺星期三朝早前會完成修訂，然後就要分別交畀眾議院同參議院嘅外交委員會處理。到目前爲止，參議院法案 (S. 1838) 有最少20位議員表示支持，而眾議院法案(H.R. 3289)有最少33位議員支持。兩條法案都估計可以通過參眾兩院嘅委員會，最快希望可以喺十月嘅國會休會後進行審議。

A quick update on where we are at with the "Hong Kong Human Rights and Democracy Act". Currently, the companion bills (one for the Senate and one for the House of Representatives) are being marked up by its respective committees. The bills will be proposed to the Senate committee on Foreign Relations and the House committee on Foreign Affairs, respectively, on Wednesday. Both bills are expected to clear both committees. If all goes well, it should proceed to the floor after the congressional recess in October.
